arts.ttl: Fiorentina set sights on Folorunsho: Strategies to convince Napoli
arts.sum: Fiorentina have identified Michael Folorunsho as their top transfer target for the January window, following a first half of the season where the player found himself on the fringes at Napoli. This interest has intensified, particularly in light of Edoardo Bove's unavailability. The post Fiorentina set sights on Folorunsho: Strategies to convince Napoli appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Conceiçao: ‘My future? I am happy here at Juventus’
arts.sum: Chico Conceição is set to start in Juventus' crucial match against Fiorentina at the Allianz Stadium, highlighting his integral role in coach Thiago Motta's plans. The Portuguese winger has established himself as a key player for the Bianconeri since joining on loan from Porto, with Juventus already indicating their intention to make the move permanent for a fee of 30 million euros. The post Conceiçao: ‘My future? I am happy here at Juventus’ appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Thiago Motta wants Fikayo Tomori at Juventus
arts.sum: Juventus have identified Fikayo Tomori as one of their top targets to strengthen their defensive line. The English defender has caught the attention of Juventus manager Thiago Motta, who has explicitly requested his acquisition.
